The '''Falls of Dessiar''' were a group of waterfalls on [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]] renowned for their beauty and peace. Much like all things on Ithor, they were destroyed when the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] laid waste to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

{{Nature-stub}}
